label: Stat part (metabolism total)
description: Scales the stat by a curve evaluated against the pawn's total metabolism gene score.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping metabolism total to the stat factor.
